seoTitle: Bethel vs Beverley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bethel and Beverley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bethel and Beverley.
heading: Bethel vs Beverley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bethel, South Australia and Beverley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beverley has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bethel (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bethel or Beverley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bethel has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Beverley scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bethel scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Beverley scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bethel or Beverley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beverley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
